feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: > buy legendary 80s synth online > arrive pristine, original factory sounds from…
entry.content: > buy legendary 80s synth online > arrive pristine, original factory sounds from 1984 intact > turn it on > "BATTERY LOW (CR2032)" > panic.png > realize if i turn it off, the volatile RAM clears and the patches are gone forever > options: > A) try to solder a new battery holder onto the live mainboard while the power is on so it doesn't lose voltage (terrifying, chance of shorting the voice chips) > B) use legacy desktop software from the Clinton administration to dump the SysEx files > C) write

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Star Fox 64
entry.content: >Game is very short but insanely replayable, can be beaten in a single sitting >Has lots of optional hidden routes meaning that if you only play it once you'll miss most of the game Unironically KINO game design. Such a shame modern games can't really do this unless its a randomized run based game because gamers will immediately start screeching about value.

A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /g/ Technology: >be me >trying to dump custom sysex patches from a roland juno >have to download…
entry.content: >be me >trying to dump custom sysex patches from a roland juno >have to download desktop software last updated during the bush administration >drivers keep crashing on win 11 >fuck this, i'm a web dev spent the last month building a web-midi tool that does this natively in chrome/edge. no installs, no legacy driver shit, just dumps sysex direct to a web app. test it out if you have old vintage gear laying around. let me know if it bugs out on your midi interface: knob.monster

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I've decided to continue picrel. Despite how mindnumbingly boring it is, and tha…
entry.content: I've decided to continue picrel. Despite how mindnumbingly boring it is, and that the thought of having to climb another 140 floors of Tartarus makes me wanna blow my brains out, it's also one of the most unique games I've ever played. I've also grown quite attached to the characters. I just reached the part where Hobo Jesus kills Shinjiro

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why doesn't 4chan implement nested posts?
entry.content: I was reading up on chan history and found out that long ago 4chan didn't even have hover-over-quotelinks to find out which post anons are replying to! You had to scroll up and match the post number with the quote to find out (futaba chan still does it btw). Later on 4chan-x came in and introduced backlinks and hover-over-quotelinks, which 4chan adopted. So why not take it one step further and implement a reddit like nested structure for arranging posts within posts? Makes 4chan a lot more navig

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I just shaved my beard after 6 years, looked the size of pic related. Though i a…
entry.content: I just shaved my beard after 6 years, looked the size of pic related. Though i am not a handsome chad. My jaw under my ears looks potato, moon face. I feel the area and I cant feel any fat, its muscle and small amount of pullable skin. Anyone have a similar experience? i want to know if this is a temporary effect of the skin being taught from a beard or if it is a change to my facial structure. I am not especially fat, skinny arms and legs but have a beer belly from drinking lots of beer.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why is google ai so bad?
entry.content: >we have 1 million context length! >(no you can’t actually access it outside of extremely janky ai studio, the actual context length on $20 sub in app/web interface is 32k which is less than free chatgpt) >agentic coding! >(antigravity is the worst of the big three and steering gemini models is like herding cats, long term instruction following is total trash) >deep research! >(results return the state of the art from 2022 despite newer findings making it mostly inaccurate) >excessively restrict

entry.title: /news/ News: Epstein worked with Israeli PM to sell private surveillance services internationally.
entry.content: https://www.dropsitenews.com/p/epst ein-barak-congo-israel Former Israeli Prime Minister Ehud Barak coordinated closely with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in pursuit of mineral, oil, and gas resources in Africa after Barak’s resignation as Israel’s defense minister in 2013, according to documents published by the U.S. Department of Justice and hacked emails from Barak’s Gmail account reviewed by Drop Site News. Epstein played a pivotal role in Barak’s transition from the military to the
